themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "I am a stranger and a sojourner with you: give me a possession of a buryingplace with you, th...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Suffering
